mnemonics.title: Algorithm Order
mnemonics.content: I Drove Carefully 45 (ID3 -> C4.5 -> CART). ID3 came first, then C4.5 improved it, then CART provided a different approach.

mnemonics.title: Splitting Criteria
mnemonics.content: IG for ID, GR for Core (Information Gain for ID3, Gain Ratio for C4.5). Gini for CART Classification, Variance for CART Regression.
